title: ECNL vs MLS NEXT: What This Week's Data Shows

faq.q: How are youth soccer teams ranked?

faq.q: Are GotSoccer rankings accurate?
faq.a: GotSoccer rankings are based primarily on tournament points, which rewards quantity of tournaments played over quality of results. PitchRank uses actual match outcomes across all leagues for a more accurate picture.

faq.q: When should my child start competitive soccer?

faq.q: How do youth soccer age groups work?
faq.a: Youth soccer uses birth-year age groups (U10 through U19). Starting 2026-2027, the age cutoff shifts to August 1 - July 31. PitchRank ranks every age group.
